overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic stone dormitory in a video game. The player walks through a vaulted corridor with green stained glass ceilings, enters a large circular sleeping quarters with four-poster beds and a central stove, explores the room, exits back to the corridor, and re-enters to explore again.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone corridor with green stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone corridor toward the wooden door at the end

entered.detail: arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting extending down the hallway
green-tinted glass panels set into the ceiling allowing dim light
ornate black metal railings lining both sides of the corridor
wall-mounted lanterns casting warm orange light on stone walls
decorative rug with intricate patterns covering the stone floor
large dark wooden door with glass panels and silver metal scrollwork

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a narrow gothic corridor with vaulted stone ceilings and green stained glass skylights. Wrought iron railings line the path, and wall sconces provide warm lighting. At the end of the corridor stands a large wooden door with decorative metalwork.

events.description: approaches and opens the wooden door with glass panels
enters the large circular dormitory room with vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: opening the wooden door and stepping into the large circular dormitory

entered.detail: thick stone archway surrounding the door entrance
large open circular chamber with multiple beds visible in the distance
wooden bed with dark green fabric canopy and curtains
white ornate stove or heater with stacked logs beside it
dark wood dresser with drawers against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the wooden door, opens it to reveal a large circular dormitory. The scene transitions from the narrow corridor to a wide open room with stone vaulted ceilings, multiple four-poster beds with green canopies, and a central heating stove.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular gothic dormitory with multiple four-poster beds

events.description: pans right to view the beds and furniture on the right side of the room
pans left to view the left side of the room with wardrobe and tapestries

agents.ego_description: looking around the dormitory, examining the beds, furniture, and architectural details

entered.detail: large decorative tapestry hanging on the curved stone wall
circular decorative pattern in the center of the domed ceiling
tall dark wood wardrobe cabinet against the left wall

changed.to: right_mid and left_mid as camera pans
center_far as camera moves deeper into room

segments.scene_description: The player explores the spacious circular dormitory, panning right to view wall tapestries and dressers, then left to see wooden wardrobes. The room features multiple four-poster beds with green canopies arranged around a central stove, all beneath an ornate vaulted ceiling with a circular decorative centerpiece.

events.description: opens door and exits the dormitory room back to the stone corridor
turns left and walks away from the door down the corridor

agents.ego_description: opening the door from inside and stepping back into the corridor, then walking away

entered.detail: returning to the stone corridor with vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dormitory through the same wooden door, returning to the stone corridor. The camera turns left and walks away from the door, passing the green stained glass skylights and wrought iron railings once more.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through gothic corridor to dormitory

events.description: approaches the wooden door for second entry into the dormitory

agents.ego_description: walking back down the corridor toward the dormitory door for a second visit

entered.detail: approaching the wooden door again from the corridor side

segments.scene_description: The player walks back down the gothic corridor, passing the familiar green stained glass ceiling and wall sconces, approaching the wooden door to the dormitory once again.

events.description: pans left to view wooden desk, chair, and posters on the wall
exits the room through the wooden door back to corridor

agents.ego_description: re-entering the dormitory and exploring different angles, viewing the desk area and posters before exiting

entered.detail: wooden writing desk with red upholstered chair
posters and notices pinned to the stone wall above the desk
tall wooden framed mirror standing against the right wall

changed.to: left_far and right_mid as camera pans

segments.scene_description: The player re-enters the dormitory and explores different areas, focusing on a wooden desk with wall posters on the left and a full-length mirror on the right. After viewing the beds and central stove from new angles, the player exits back through the wooden door to the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that moves from a narrow gothic corridor into a spacious circular dormitory and back again. It begins by gliding down a stone hallway under green stained glass skylights and warm wall sconces before approaching and opening a decorative wooden door. As the camera crosses the threshold, the space expands into a wide circular room filled with green-canopied four-poster beds and a central heating stove, panning across wall tapestries, wardrobes, and an ornate vaulted ceiling. The scene then shifts as the camera retreats back through the wooden door into the corridor, turning left to pass the wrought iron railings before looping back toward the entrance. Finally, the camera re-enters the dormitory to examine a wooden desk with posters and a full-length mirror, viewing the central stove from new angles before exiting once more into the stone hallway.
